name: integration_chatgpt_and_ecommerce_seo_chatgpt_pull
method:
ChatGPT and Ecommerce SEO **ChatGPT pulls from Google Shopping for product results**

When you ask ChatGPT for product recommendations, it runs encoded "fan-out" queries through Google Shopping in the

phases.name: audit
steps: scan all deployed product/landing URLs from DEPLOYMENT_URLS.md
check each for Product JSON-LD schema markup
check for price, availability, review, image fields

phases.name: fix
steps: inject missing Product schema into landing pages missing it
generate Google Merchant Center product feed XML from PRODUCTS/ data
add canonical URLs and OpenGraph product tags

phases.name: monitor
steps: query ChatGPT for product recommendations in our niches (streak apps, prayer apps, PDF tools)
log which competitors appear in AI shopping carousels
